scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @personal-care/shared-types && node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev --workspace @personal-care/api" "npm run dev --workspace @personal-care/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @personal-care/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @personal-care/api && npm run build --workspace @personal-care/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @personal-care/shared-types && npm run test --workspace @personal-care/shared-types && npm run test --workspace @personal-care/api
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @personal-care/shared-types && npm run lint --workspace @personal-care/api && npm run lint --workspace @personal-care/web
